events.name: SUBMIT
events.description: Event dispatch props (for trait state machine integration)

events.name: CANCEL
events.description: Event to dispatch on cancel (defaults to 'CANCEL')

events.name: FIELD_CHANGE
events.description: Callback when any field value changes

events.name: FormSectionLoaded
events.description: FormSection rows finished loading; payload.data holds the collection.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cancel Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event to dispatch on cancel (defaults to 'CANCEL')

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cancel Label
overridableConfigKeys.description: Cancel button label (if provided, shows cancel button)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Children
overridableConfigKeys.description: Form fields (traditional React children)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Class Name
overridableConfigKeys.description: Additional CSS classes

overridableConfigKeys.label: Conditional Fields
overridableConfigKeys.description: Inspection form extensions

overridableConfigKeys.label: Config Path
overridableConfigKeys.description: Config path for form configuration (schema-driven)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Error
overridableConfigKeys.description: Error state

overridableConfigKeys.label: Evaluation Context
overridableConfigKeys.description: Context for S-expression evaluation

overridableConfigKeys.label: Fields
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fields definition (schema format) - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gap
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gap between fields

overridableConfigKeys.label: Hidden Calculations
overridableConfigKeys.description: Hidden calculations that emit GLOBAL_VARIABLE_SET on field change (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Is Loading
overridableConfigKeys.description: Loading state

overridableConfigKeys.label: Layout
overridableConfigKeys.description: Form layout

overridableConfigKeys.label: Mode
overridableConfigKeys.description: Form mode — 'create' for new records, 'edit' for updating existing. Accepts `string` so schema-driven callers (whose `config.mode` is typed as `string` per the trait's declared config block) compile cleanly. The runtime treats anything other than 'edit' as 'create'.

overridableConfigKeys.label: On Cancel
overridableConfigKeys.description: Cancel event name for trait dispatch (emitted via eventBus as UI:{onCancel})

overridableConfigKeys.label: On Field Change
overridableConfigKeys.description: Callback when any field value changes

overridableConfigKeys.label: On Submit
overridableConfigKeys.description: Submit event name for trait dispatch (emitted via eventBus as UI:{onSubmit})

overridableConfigKeys.label: Relations Data
overridableConfigKeys.description: Relation data props

overridableConfigKeys.label: Relations Loading
overridableConfigKeys.description: Loading state for relation data: { fieldName: boolean }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Repeatable
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether the form supports repeatable entries

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sections
overridableConfigKeys.description: Nested form sections with optional conditions

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Cancel
overridableConfigKeys.description: Show cancel button (defaults to true for schema forms)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Submit
overridableConfigKeys.description: Show submit button (defaults to true for schema forms). Set false when a parent atom owns the submit action externally (e.g. wizard footers).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Submit Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event dispatch props (for trait state machine integration)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Submit Label
overridableConfigKeys.description: Submit button label

overridableConfigKeys.label: Title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Form title (used by ModalSlot to extract title)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Violation Triggers
overridableConfigKeys.description: Violation conditions that emit VIOLATION_DETECTED when met (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for ui-form-section / FormSectionOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

cancelEvent.description: Event to dispatch on cancel (defaults to 'CANCEL')

cancelLabel.description: Cancel button label (if provided, shows cancel button)

fields.description: Fields definition (schema format) - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

hiddenCalculations.description: Hidden calculations that emit GLOBAL_VARIABLE_SET on field change (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

mode.description: Form mode — 'create' for new records, 'edit' for updating existing. Accepts `string` so schema-driven callers (whose `config.mode` is typed as `string` per the trait's declared config block) compile cleanly. The runtime treats anything other than 'edit' as 'create'.

onCancel.description: Cancel event name for trait dispatch (emitted via eventBus as UI:{onCancel})

onFieldChange.description: Callback when any field value changes

onSubmit.description: Submit event name for trait dispatch (emitted via eventBus as UI:{onSubmit})

relationsLoading.description: Loading state for relation data: { fieldName: boolean }

repeatable.description: Whether the form supports repeatable entries

sections.description: Nested form sections with optional conditions

showCancel.description: Show cancel button (defaults to true for schema forms)

showSubmit.description: Show submit button (defaults to true for schema forms). Set false when a parent atom owns the submit action externally (e.g. wizard footers).

submitEvent.description: Event dispatch props (for trait state machine integration)

title.description: Form title (used by ModalSlot to extract title)

violationTriggers.description: Violation conditions that emit VIOLATION_DETECTED when met (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.
